allow: Bash(find . -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i -e 's/rounded-\\[14px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[16px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[18px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[20px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[22px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[24px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[28px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/rounded-\\[32px\\]/rounded-[4px]/g' -e 's/border-border\\/80/border-border/g' -e 's/border-border\\/70/border-border/g' -e s/backdrop-blur-sm//g -e s/backdrop-blur//g -e s/shadow-sm//g -e s/shadow-md//g -e s/shadow-lg//g -e s/shadow-none//g -e 's/bg-muted\\/60/bg-muted/g' -e 's/bg-muted\\/40/bg-accent/g' -e 's/bg-muted\\/20/bg-accent/g' -e 's/bg-background\\/85/bg-background\\/90/g' -e 's/bg-\\[#211922\\]\\/30/bg-background\\/80/g' '{}' +)
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/tdlib_file_mapper.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('mapper OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('app/tdlib_downloads.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('downloads OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('routes:', len\(app.routes\)\)")
